Document: proposal_automotive.docx
Type: Marketing Proposal
Section: Introduction

Digital Marketing Proposal - Drive Egypt Automotive Group

Client: Drive Egypt Automotive Group | Industry: Automotive

Prepared by: ProPoser Digital Marketing Agency | June 2025

Document: proposal_automotive.docx
Type: Marketing Proposal
Section: Executive Summary

Drive Media Agency presents this comprehensive digital marketing proposal for Drive Egypt Automotive Group, Egypt's fastest-growing multi-brand car dealership with 8 showrooms nationwide. Our strategy aims to increase qualified test drive bookings by 45% and achieve EGP 120M in attributed sales within 12 months.

Current challenge: 72% of car buyers in Egypt research online before visiting a showroom, yet Drive Egypt's digital presence captures only 18% of this traffic.

Market Analysis

Egypt automotive market size: EGP 280 billion annually

New car sales growth: 22% YoY

Online research before purchase: 72% of buyers

Top research platforms: Google (68%), YouTube (45%), Facebook (38%)

Key competitors: Toyota Egypt, GB Auto, Nissan Egypt

Opportunity: SUV segment growing 35% — Drive Egypt has 4 SUV brands

Proposed Services

1. Search Engine Marketing

Google Search campaigns for 200+ car-related keywords

Display remarketing to website visitors

YouTube pre-roll ads showcasing test drives

2. Social Media Management

Facebook & Instagram: 25 posts/month with professional photography

TikTok: Weekly car review videos targeting 25-45 age group

LinkedIn: Fleet sales targeting corporate clients

3. Lead Generation System

WhatsApp Business API for instant lead response

CRM integration with automated follow-up sequences

Virtual showroom tours on website

Document: proposal_automotive.docx
Type: Marketing Proposal
Section: Kpis

Monthly qualified leads: 800+

Test drive bookings: 200/month

Cost per lead: below EGP 175

ROAS (Return on Ad Spend): 8:1

Website traffic increase: 150%

Service | Monthly Cost

Google & YouTube Ads | EGP 85,000

Social Media Management | EGP 25,000

Content Production | EGP 20,000

CRM & Lead Management | EGP 10,000

Total Monthly Retainer | EGP 140,000

Document: proposal_banking.docx
Type: Marketing Proposal
Section: Introduction

Digital Marketing Proposal - NilePay Digital Bank

Client: NilePay Digital Bank | Industry: Banking & Fintech

Prepared by: ProPoser Digital Marketing Agency | June 2025

Document: proposal_banking.docx
Type: Marketing Proposal
Section: Executive Summary

NilePay Digital Bank aims to acquire 500,000 active digital wallet users within 24 months. This proposal leverages Egypt's financial inclusion mandate and the Central Bank of Egypt's digital payments initiative to position NilePay as Egypt's premier mobile banking solution.

Market Analysis

Egypt unbanked population: 42 million adults

Mobile wallet users growth: 65% YoY

Digital transactions volume: EGP 2.3 trillion in 2024

CBE digital payments initiative target: 70% cashless by 2026

Competition: Vodafone Cash, Fawry, CIB Smart Wallet

Key differentiator: Zero fees for first year + 12% interest on savings

Proposed Services

Brand awareness campaign across all digital channels

Performance campaigns for app downloads

Financial literacy content marketing

Partnership marketing with merchants and retailers

Referral program digital activation

WhatsApp customer service automation

Document: proposal_banking.docx
Type: Marketing Proposal
Section: Kpis

Cost per activated user: below EGP 120

Month-3 retention: 55%+

Average transaction value: EGP 350+

Service | Monthly Cost

Digital Advertising | EGP 150,000

Content Marketing | EGP 20,000

Partnership Activations | EGP 30,000

Agency Fee | EGP 35,000

Total Monthly | EGP 235,000

Document: proposal_ecommerce.docx
Type: Marketing Proposal
Section: Introduction

Digital Marketing Proposal - ShopEasy E-commerce Platform

Client: ShopEasy E-commerce Platform | Industry: E-commerce & Retail Tech

Prepared by: ProPoser Digital Marketing Agency | June 2025

Document: proposal_ecommerce.docx
Type: Marketing Proposal
Section: Executive Summary

ShopEasy is Egypt's emerging marketplace with 1,200 sellers and 85,000 monthly active users. This proposal targets scaling to 500,000 monthly active users and EGP 50M monthly GMV within 18 months through aggressive performance marketing and brand building.

Market Analysis

Egypt e-commerce market: EGP 45 billion annually

Market growth rate: 38% YoY

Mobile commerce share: 78% of all purchases

Top categories: Fashion (32%), Electronics (28%), Beauty (18%)

Competition: Noon, Amazon Egypt, Jumia

Opportunity: Fashion and handmade products niche (underserved)

Proposed Services

Performance marketing: Facebook, Google, TikTok

App Store Optimization (ASO) for iOS & Android

Seller acquisition campaigns targeting SMEs

Cashback and referral program marketing

Influencer marketing with micro-influencers (5K-50K)

SMS & push notification campaigns

Digital Marketing Proposal - ConnectMore Telecom

Client: ConnectMore Telecom | Industry: Telecommunications

Prepared by: ProPoser Digital Marketing Agency | June 2025

Document: proposal_telecom.docx
Type: Marketing Proposal
Section: Executive Summary

ConnectMore Telecom is launching a new prepaid SIM offering targeting Egypt's youth segment (18-30). This proposal covers the full digital launch strategy to acquire 1 million subscribers in the first 6 months, leveraging competitive pricing and a digital-first approach.

Market Analysis

Egypt mobile subscribers: 105 million

Prepaid market share: 82%

Youth segment (18-30) size: 28 million

Average ARPU: EGP 45/month

SIM switch rate: 22% annually

Digital channel preference for youth: TikTok (78%), Instagram (65%), YouTube (58%)

Proposed Services

TikTok launch campaign with viral challenges

YouTube pre-roll and masthead ads

Outdoor + digital integration campaigns

Campus ambassador program (50 universities)

Social media community management

Chatbot for plan comparison and SIM activation

Document: proposal_tourism.docx
Type: Marketing Proposal
Section: Introduction

Digital Marketing Proposal - Discover Egypt Tours

Client: Discover Egypt Tours | Industry: Tourism & Hospitality

Prepared by: ProPoser Digital Marketing Agency | June 2025

Document: proposal_tourism.docx
Type: Marketing Proposal
Section: Executive Summary

This proposal outlines a 12-month digital marketing strategy for Discover Egypt Tours to attract international tourists and increase bookings by 80%. We will focus on English, German, and French-speaking markets in Europe and North America, leveraging Egypt's post-pandemic tourism recovery surge.

Market Analysis

Egypt tourism revenue target 2025: USD 17 billion

International tourist arrivals growth: 28% YoY

Top source markets: Germany (18%), UK (15%), USA (12%), France (10%)

Average booking value: USD 2,400 per person

Booking platform preference: 64% book directly after Google search

TripAdvisor rating impact: 4.8+ rating drives 40% more bookings

Proposed Services

Google Search campaigns in English, German, French

TripAdvisor premium listing management

Instagram & Pinterest visual content strategy

Influencer partnerships with travel bloggers (10K-500K followers)

Email nurturing campaigns for inquiries

SEO for 'Egypt tours', 'Nile cruise', 'Egypt pyramids tour' etc.

Document: proposal_tourism.docx
Type: Marketing Proposal
Section: Kpis

Monthly qualified inquiries: 500+

Direct bookings increase: 80%

TripAdvisor rating: 4.8+

Cost per booking: below USD 350

Top 3 Google ranking for 20 target keywords

Service | Monthly Cost

International PPC (Google) | USD 8,000

Social Media & Content | USD 3,500

Influencer Marketing | USD 4,000

Email & CRM | USD 1,500

Total Monthly | USD 17,000

Type: Case Study
Section: Case Study

BrightPath Learning Academy

Education & EdTech

June 2025 | ProPoser Digital Marketing Agency

Client Overview

BrightPath Learning Academy: Premium tutoring center for K-12 students in Cairo. Capacity: 600 students. Occupancy rate at start: 52% (312 students). Goal: Reach full capacity (600) within one academic year.

Challenge

Parents discover the academy mainly through word-of-mouth. Enrollment drops 40% every summer. No digital presence to capture demand during peak enrollment periods (August-September).

Document: case_study_education.docx
Type: Case Study
Section: Results

Strategy

Facebook & Instagram campaigns targeting parents in specific Cairo districts

YouTube channel: 'Better Grades With BrightPath' (free study tips)

Google Search ads during peak enrollment months

Summer camp digital launch to retain students year-round

WhatsApp parent community for academic updates

Detailed Results

Enrollment: 312 → 598 students (92% of capacity)

Summer retention: 40% drop → only 12% drop

Cost per enrollment: EGP 850 → EGP 280

Google brand searches: +450%

Parent WhatsApp community: 800 members with 65% engagement rate

312 → 598 Students
Enrollment | 40% → 12%
Summer Drop | EGP 850 → 280
Cost/Enrollment | +450%
Brand Searches

Service Description: Content Marketing

ProPoser Digital Marketing Agency | 2025

What is Content Marketing?

Content marketing is the strategic creation and distribution of valuable content to attract, engage, and convert your target audience. Instead of interrupting people with ads, you attract them with content they actually want to read, watch, or share.

Content Types We Produce

Written Content

SEO blog articles (800-2,000 words)

Website copy and landing pages

Email newsletters and sequences

Product descriptions and service pages

Visual Content

Social media graphics and carousels

Infographics and data visualizations

Brand identity assets

Professional product photography

Video Content

Instagram Reels and TikTok videos (15-60 seconds)

YouTube educational videos (5-15 minutes)

Testimonial and case study videos

Why Email Marketing?

Email marketing delivers the highest ROI of any digital channel — an average of $42 for every $1 spent (4,200% ROI). It's the only channel you truly own, independent of algorithm changes or platform fees.

What We Deliver

Platform setup and configuration (Mailchimp, Klaviyo, or ActiveCampaign)

Professional email template design matching your brand

Automated email sequences: Welcome, Abandoned Cart, Re-engagement, Post-purchase

List segmentation for personalized campaigns

A/B testing of subject lines and content

Monthly analytics: open rates, clicks, conversions, revenue attributed
